chunks.text:
Data Engineering Basics is an important concept in modern software development. It plays a key role in building
scalable, maintainable, and efficient applications used in real-world systems. Developers use this technology or concept
together with other tools in the tech stack to design reliable solutions. Understanding how data engineering basics
works helps engineers make better architectural and implementation decisions.
